title: Dream Journal
html:
Dream Journal

Yahir's intermittent practice of capturing dreams as Apple Notes — densest in 2020 (7+ entries), continuing sporadically into 2022-2023. The entries vary from one-line image-captures to multi-paragraph narrative reconstructions, but share a consistent format: titled "Dream:" or "Dream —", first-person, written within hours of waking.

Corpus inventory

2020 (peak year):

  • 2020 04 30 dream water game 1987 crash — Hannah, water-game, plane crash
  • 2020 05 07 dream tribal fight — tribal fight with Trump + Harley Quinn squad, Riley aphorism, special-abilities frame
  • 2020 06 11 dream alexandria death note — waiting on Alexandria + cannabis-industry death-note
  • 2020 06 13 dream shooter prep — drill turned real, mom-set-up framing
  • 2020 09 26 dream alexandria haircut card attack — Alexandria-haircut + card-attack
  • 2020 10 15 haunted house dream — haunted-house

2022-2023:

  • 2022 04 15 riley pirate river dream — Riley + pirate + river
  • 2022 11 05 shot dream numb — shot, numb
  • 2023 03 26 just dreamt that i was one of the most pursued people in the — pursuit
  • 2023 05 08 dad as monster dream — dad as monster

Recurring objects

  • People-as-objects-of-attention: Alexandria (multiple), Hannah, Riley, Emilio, the dad
  • Threat-as-image: shooters, monsters, pursuit, supernatural judgment (Death Note)
  • Squads / collective-fight scenes with named friends + pop-culture figures (Trump, Harley Quinn, Death Note)

What it documents

The dream-journal is Yahir's most direct evidence of his unconscious attention-architecture — the people whose absence his mind is trying to resolve through narrative, the threat-models his teenage self was processing, and the pop culture symbol-bank he was running on at 17. The 2020 cluster maps almost perfectly to his waking-life social map of Grants Pass + COVID + family.

Connections

grants pass teen era · covid pandemic era · alexandria nagy · emilio · the boys
